subcodes.first_line: That Sacred Leaf, whose verses have been set forth through pure inspiration, bestoweth remembrance and guidance--verily, through none save the remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک ورقه القدس فصلت آیاتها بالفطره الخالص و یلقی الذکر و الهدی الا بذکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
